title: stachys perfoliata
intro: Stachys perfoliata, also known as Betony or Wood Betony, is a perennial herb native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia, characterized by its distinctive leaves that surround the stem. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it effective in treating wounds, headaches, and fever. The health benefits of Stachys perfoliata include its ability to improve cognitive function, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia. Stachys perfoliata can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, teas, tinctures, and dried extracts, which are often used in traditional herbal remedies.
